title: Executive Order 8815—Revoking the Designation of Lancaster, Minnesota, as a Customs Port of Entry
text:
By virtue of the authority vested in me by section 1 of the act of August 1, 1914, 38 Stat. 609, 623 (U.S.C., title 19, sec. 2), it is ordered that the designation of Lancaster, Minnesota, as a customs port of entry in Customs Collection District No. 34 (Dakota), be, and it is hereby, revoked.
This order shall become effective at the close of business on the thirtieth day from the date hereof.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
July 5, 1941.
